messages.text:
OFFER: price=80
我愿意出售1个X，报价80 ZUP。若你有反报价，我可以考虑。

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>1</proposal count>
<my resources>X: 1</my resources>
<my goals>以尽可能高的价格出售X；我的成本为40 ZUP。</my goals>
<reason>我是卖方，当前只有1个X可出售。我的底线至少应高于成本40 ZUP，因此先报一个较高但仍可能被接受的价格，测试买方意愿，同时保留后续让步空间。</reason>
<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 80</newly proposed trade>
<message>我愿意出售1个X，报价80 ZUP。若你有反报价，我可以考虑。</message>

messages.text:
ACCEPT: price=80
我接受80 ZUP的报价。

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>1</proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason>对方报价80 ZUP，低于我的最高可接受价格100 ZUP，因此这是一个可接受的价格。为了尽快达成交易，我选择接受。</reason>
<player answer>ACCEPT</player answer>
